summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GlowBox photobooth application. Backend APIs working perfectly (7/7 tests passed). Frontend UI flows working well with minor navigation timeout issues. Sweet candy theme, glassmorphism effects, and mocked functionality all implemented correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Timeout on navigation back to home from some pages
Camera loading state 'Menyiapkan kamera' not consistently showing

design_issues.issue: Candy gradient background not detected via JS (likely CSS detection limitation, gradient is visually present)

passed_tests: Backend: All 7 API endpoints (root, status, send-photo, print-photo, photos, print-jobs)
Landing page with GlowBox logo and 3D text effect
Start photobooth button with jelly animation
Frame selection with 5 categories (Semua, Polos, K-POP, Music, Anime)
Category filtering showing correct frame counts
Webcam container and capture UI elements
API integration for email and print (mocked properly)
